introduction: This spec defines the HTTP handlers for organization CRUD, lifecycle management (block/unblock), and membership management in the apikit system. Note: requirements referencing Server Core (spec 01), Database Layer (spec 02), and Auth Middleware (spec 05) APIs are based on PRD dependency descriptions and should be cross-checked against the installed packages before implementation.

glossary.APIError: Server Core helper that returns a standard JSON error envelope with code and message fields.
glossary.APIGroup: Server Core function that returns the root Echo group with auth middleware and Cache-Control: no-store applied.
glossary.Admin: A user with role 'admin' or the holder of an admin token. Required for all org mutations.
glossary.Blocked org: An organization with status = 'blocked'. Excluded from default listings; still accessible via direct ID lookup.
glossary.CacheMiddleware: Server Core middleware factory that sets cache-control headers on responses.
glossary.CacheNoStore: Server Core constant passed to CacheMiddleware to set Cache-Control: no-store.
glossary.Cascade delete: When an org is deleted, all `org_members` rows referencing that org are automatically deleted by the database's ON DELETE CASCADE constraint.
glossary.CheckETag: Server Core helper that checks the If-None-Match request header against the current ETag; returns true if the client's cached version is still fresh.
glossary.CreateOrgRequest: Go struct representing the JSON request body for creating an organization.
glossary.DELETE /orgs/:id: HTTP endpoint to delete an organization and cascade-delete its memberships. Admin only.
glossary.DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id: HTTP endpoint to remove a user from an organization. Admin only.
glossary.FormatUTC: Server Core helper that formats a time.Time value as an RFC 3339 UTC string.
glossary.GET /orgs: HTTP endpoint to list all organizations. Admin only.
glossary.GET /orgs/:id: HTTP endpoint to retrieve a single organization by UUID. Admin or org member.
glossary.GET /orgs/:id/members: HTTP endpoint to list members of an organization. Admin or org member.
glossary.GetAuthInfo: Auth middleware function that retrieves the full AuthInfo struct from the Echo context.
glossary.GetUserID: Auth middleware function that retrieves the authenticated user's UUID string from the Echo context.
glossary.IsAdmin: Auth middleware function that returns true if the authenticated user has admin role.
glossary.NowUTC: Server Core helper that returns the current time in UTC.
glossary.Org member: A user associated with an organization via a row in the `org_members` table. Membership grants view access to the org and its member list.
glossary.OrgMemberResponse: Go struct representing the JSON response shape for an organization membership record.
glossary.OrgResponse: Go struct representing the JSON response shape for an organization resource.
glossary.Organization: A grouping entity for users with CRUD, block/unblock lifecycle, and membership management. Has no permission implications in this iteration.
glossary.PATCH /orgs/:id: HTTP endpoint to update an organization's name and/or URL. Admin only.
glossary.POST /orgs: HTTP endpoint to create a new organization. Admin only.
glossary.POST /orgs/:id/block: HTTP endpoint to block an organization. Admin only.
glossary.POST /orgs/:id/unblock: HTTP endpoint to unblock an organization. Admin only.
glossary.PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id: HTTP endpoint to add a user to an organization. Admin only.
glossary.ParseUTC: Server Core helper that parses an RFC 3339 UTC string into a time.Time value.
glossary.RegisterOrgHandlers: Handler registration function that mounts all organization endpoints on the Echo group.
glossary.RequireAdmin: Auth middleware function that returns an error if the authenticated user is not an admin.
glossary.SetETag: Server Core helper that sets an ETag response header derived from a resource's updated_at timestamp.
glossary.Slug: A URL-safe identifier for an organization, consisting of lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores. Immutable after creation.
glossary.UpdateOrgRequest: Go struct representing the JSON request body for updating an organization.
glossary.db.ErrNotFound: Database layer sentinel error returned when a queried row does not exist.
glossary.db.FormatTime: Database layer helper that formats a time.Time value for storage in SQLite.
glossary.db.ParseTime: Database layer helper that parses a SQLite timestamp string into a time.Time value.
glossary.db.WrapError: Database layer helper that wraps a raw SQLite error into a typed error for consistent handling.
glossary.include_blocked: Query parameter on GET /orgs that, when set to 'true', includes blocked organizations in the result.
glossary.isOrgMember: Helper function that queries org_members to check whether a given user belongs to a given organization.
glossary.org_members: Database table storing organization membership as (org_id, user_id) pairs with a created_at timestamp.
glossary.orgs: Database table storing organization records (id, name, slug, url, status, timestamps).
glossary.users: Database table storing user account records including username, email, and role.

user_story.goal: register all organization endpoints on the Echo API group
user_story.benefit: organization routes are available when the server starts

acceptance_criteria.action: registers POST /orgs, GET /orgs, GET /orgs/:id, PATCH /orgs/:id, DELETE /orgs/:id, POST /orgs/:id/block, POST /orgs/:id/unblock, GET /orgs/:id/members, PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id, and DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id on the Echo group returned by APIGroup()
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: all ten routes are mounted and reachable; the *sql.DB handle is captured in each handler's closure

acceptance_criteria.action: inherits the CacheMiddleware(CacheNoStore) applied at the APIGroup level so that every org endpoint response carries Cache-Control: no-store
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: all org endpoint responses include Cache-Control: no-store header

edge_cases.action: panics immediately at registration time rather than allowing a nil pointer dereference inside a live request handler
edge_cases.return_contract: panic with a descriptive message before any routes are registered

user_story.goal: create a new organization with a unique name and slug
user_story.benefit: users can be grouped into named organizational units

acceptance_criteria.action: validates the request, generates a UUID v4 org ID, sets status to 'active', sets created_at and updated_at to NowUTC(), inserts the row into the orgs table, and returns the OrgResponse
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 201 with OrgResponse JSON body; id is a valid UUID v4; status is 'active'; created_at equals updated_at; url defaults to empty string when omitted
acceptance_criteria.trigger: a POST /orgs request is received with a valid JSON body containing name and slug

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects the request with APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'name is required'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs is received with a missing or empty name field after whitespace trimming

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects the request with APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'slug is required'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs is received with a missing or empty slug field

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects the request with APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid slug format'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs is received with a slug that fails slug validation rules

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a conflict error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 409 with error message 'organization name already exists'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs insert violates the UNIQUE constraint on the name column of orgs

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a conflict error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 409 with error message 'organization slug already exists'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs insert violates the UNIQUE constraint on the slug column of orgs

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs is received from a non-admin authenticated user

edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid slug format'
HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid slug format'
edge_cases.error_condition: slug starts or ends with a hyphen or underscore

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError; does not leak raw SQL errors
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the orgs table INSERT fails due to a database error that is not a UNIQUE constraint violation

edge_cases.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 400 with a descriptive error message
edge_cases.error_condition: request body is not valid JSON

user_story.goal: list all organizations with optional inclusion of blocked ones
user_story.benefit: I can see and manage all organizations in the system

acceptance_criteria.action: queries the orgs table filtering by status = 'active', orders results by name ascending, and returns the list
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with a JSON array of OrgResponse objects; blocked orgs are absent; order is alphabetical by name
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs is received from an admin without the include_blocked query parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: queries the orgs table without status filtering, orders results by name ascending, and returns all orgs
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with a JSON array of OrgResponse objects including orgs with status 'blocked'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs is received with include_blocked=true query parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: returns an empty JSON array
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with body []
acceptance_criteria.state: no organizations exist in the orgs table

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs is received from a non-admin authenticated user

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the orgs table query fails with a database error

user_story.goal: retrieve a specific organization by its UUID
user_story.benefit: I can inspect the current state of an organization I have access to

acceptance_criteria.action: queries the orgs table for the matching row, sets an ETag via SetETag using the org's updated_at, and returns the org
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body and ETag response header
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id is received from an admin with a valid org UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: calls IsAdmin (returns false), calls isOrgMember with the org ID and GetUserID(), confirms membership, and returns the org
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id is received from an authenticated non-admin user who is a member of the org

acceptance_criteria.action: calls IsAdmin (returns false), calls isOrgMember (returns false), returns a forbidden error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id is received from an authenticated non-admin user who is NOT a member of the org

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id is received but the org does not exist in the orgs table

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError without querying the database
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id is received with a path parameter that is not a valid UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: calls CheckETag, determines the client's cached version is still valid, and returns not-modified
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 304 with no body
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id is received with an If-None-Match header matching the current ETag

edge_cases.action: propagates the error via APIError; does not allow access by default
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: isOrgMember query fails with a database error

user_story.goal: update an organization's name and/or URL
user_story.benefit: I can keep organization display information current without recreating the org

acceptance_criteria.action: verifies the org exists in orgs, applies the provided field updates, sets updated_at to NowUTC(), persists the changes, and returns the updated org
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with updated OrgResponse JSON body; updated_at is greater than the previous value; slug is unchanged
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id is received from an admin with a valid UUID and a non-empty UpdateOrgRequest body

acceptance_criteria.action: silently ignores the slug field and applies only name and/or url updates
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse whose slug matches the original value
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id body includes a slug field

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'no fields to update'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id is received with a body that contains no recognized fields (both name and url are nil)

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a conflict error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 409 with error message 'organization name already exists'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id update violates the UNIQUE constraint on the name column of orgs

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id is received but the org does not exist in orgs

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id is received with an invalid UUID path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PATCH /orgs/:id is received from a non-admin user

edge_cases.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'name is required'
edge_cases.error_condition: name is provided but is empty after whitespace trimming

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the orgs UPDATE fails with a non-UNIQUE database error

user_story.benefit: stale or erroneous organizations can be removed without leaving orphaned membership records

acceptance_criteria.action: deletes the matching row from the orgs table; the database ON DELETE CASCADE removes all referencing org_members rows automatically; user accounts in the users table are not affected
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 204 with no body
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id is received from an admin with a valid org UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: detects zero rows affected and returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id is received but no row in orgs matches the given UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError without querying the database
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id is received with an invalid UUID path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id is received from a non-admin user

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError; does not return 204
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the orgs DELETE statement fails with a database error

user_story.goal: set an organization's status to blocked
user_story.benefit: I can deactivate an organization without deleting it, causing it to be excluded from default listings

acceptance_criteria.action: sets status to 'blocked' and updated_at to NowUTC() in the orgs table, then returns the updated org
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body where status is 'blocked' and updated_at reflects the block time
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/block is received from an admin for an active organization

acceptance_criteria.action: performs no database update and returns the current org as-is (idempotent)
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body reflecting the unchanged org state
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/block is received for an organization that is already blocked

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/block is received but no org exists with the given UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/block is received with an invalid UUID path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/block is received from a non-admin user

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the orgs UPDATE fails with a database error

user_story.goal: restore a blocked organization to active status
user_story.benefit: I can re-enable an organization that was previously blocked without recreating it

acceptance_criteria.action: sets status to 'active' and updated_at to NowUTC() in the orgs table, then returns the updated org
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body where status is 'active' and updated_at reflects the unblock time
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/unblock is received from an admin for a blocked organization

acceptance_criteria.action: performs no database update and returns the current org as-is (idempotent)
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body reflecting the unchanged org state
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/unblock is received for an organization that is already active

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/unblock is received but no org exists with the given UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/unblock is received with an invalid UUID path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: POST /orgs/:id/unblock is received from a non-admin user

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the orgs UPDATE fails with a database error

user_story.goal: retrieve the list of members belonging to an organization
user_story.benefit: I can see who is in an organization without making multiple requests for each user

acceptance_criteria.action: verifies the org exists in orgs, queries org_members joined with users for that org, orders results by username ascending, and returns the list
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with a JSON array of OrgMemberResponse objects ordered alphabetically by username; includes user_id, username, email, role, and joined_at fields
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id/members is received from an admin with a valid org UUID

acceptance_criteria.action: calls IsAdmin (returns false), calls isOrgMember (returns true), and returns the member list
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with JSON array of OrgMemberResponse objects
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id/members is received from a non-admin user who is a member of the org

acceptance_criteria.action: calls IsAdmin (returns false), calls isOrgMember (returns false), returns a forbidden error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id/members is received from a non-admin user who is NOT a member of the org

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id/members is received but the org does not exist in orgs

acceptance_criteria.action: returns an empty JSON array
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 200 with body []
acceptance_criteria.state: the org exists but has no rows in org_members

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: GET /orgs/:id/members is received with an invalid UUID path parameter

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the join query against org_members and users fails with a database error

user_story.goal: add a user to an organization by their user UUID
user_story.benefit: I can grow organization membership without re-creating anything

acceptance_criteria.action: verifies the org exists in orgs, verifies the user exists in users, inserts a row into org_members with created_at set to NowUTC()
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 204 with no body
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received from an admin with valid UUIDs for both org and user

acceptance_criteria.action: detects the duplicate (org_id, user_id) primary key and returns 204 without inserting a new row (idempotent)
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 204 with no body
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received for a user who is already a member of the org

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'organization not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received but the org does not exist in orgs

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'user not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received but the user does not exist in users

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError without querying the database
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received with an invalid UUID for the org path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError without querying the database
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid user id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received with an invalid UUID for the user_id path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received from a non-admin user

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the org_members INSERT fails with a database error that is not a primary key conflict

user_story.goal: remove a user from an organization
user_story.benefit: I can revoke a user's org membership without deleting the user account

acceptance_criteria.action: deletes the org_members row matching (org_id, user_id); the user's account in users is not affected
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 204 with no body
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received from an admin with valid UUIDs

acceptance_criteria.action: detects zero rows deleted and returns a not-found error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 404 with error message 'membership not found'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received but no matching org_members row exists

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid organization id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received with an invalid UUID for the org path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: returns a bad request error via APIError
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 400 with error message 'invalid user id'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received with an invalid UUID for the user_id path parameter

acceptance_criteria.action: calls RequireAdmin which returns an error; handler propagates it
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 403 with error message 'forbidden'
acceptance_criteria.trigger: DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id is received from a non-admin user

edge_cases.action: wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns an internal error via APIError
edge_cases.return_contract: HTTP 500 with error message 'internal server error'
edge_cases.error_condition: the org_members DELETE fails with a database error

user_story.goal: have slug values enforced to URL-safe format rules at creation time
user_story.benefit: slugs remain safe to embed in URLs and consistent across the system

acceptance_criteria.action: accepts slugs consisting solely of lowercase ASCII letters (a-z), digits (0-9), hyphens (-), and underscores (_), with length between 1 and 128 characters inclusive, that do not start or end with a hyphen or underscore
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: validation passes; no error returned

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects slugs containing uppercase letters, spaces, or any character outside [a-z0-9_-]
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: returns error 'invalid slug format'

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects slugs that start with a hyphen or underscore
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: returns error 'invalid slug format'

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects slugs that end with a hyphen or underscore
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: returns error 'invalid slug format'

acceptance_criteria.action: rejects slugs longer than 128 characters
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: returns error 'invalid slug format'

user_story.goal: check whether a user belongs to an organization in a single database query
user_story.benefit: membership access control can be enforced without duplicating query logic across handlers

acceptance_criteria.action: queries org_members for the (org_id, user_id) row and returns true
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: (true, nil)
acceptance_criteria.trigger: called with a valid orgID and userID where a matching row exists in org_members

acceptance_criteria.action: queries org_members, finds no row, and returns false
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: (false, nil)
acceptance_criteria.trigger: called with a valid orgID and userID where no matching row exists in org_members

edge_cases.action: returns the error without panicking; the caller receives a non-nil error and must propagate it as HTTP 500
edge_cases.error_condition: the org_members query fails with a database error

user_story.goal: be rejected at all org endpoints
user_story.benefit: organization data is never exposed without a valid credential

acceptance_criteria.action: rely on the auth middleware attached to the APIGroup to reject unauthenticated requests before the handler body executes
acceptance_criteria.return_contract: HTTP 401 for all requests missing a valid credential, regardless of endpoint

correctness_properties.title: Slug Immutability
correctness_properties.invariant: the slug value set at creation time is never modified by updateOrg, blockOrg, or unblockOrg; only the orgs INSERT may set it

correctness_properties.title: updated_at Monotonicity
correctness_properties.for_any: organization in orgs that undergoes a mutating operation (update, block, unblock)
correctness_properties.invariant: the updated_at value after the operation is greater than or equal to the updated_at value before the operation

correctness_properties.title: Blocked Org Listing Exclusion
correctness_properties.invariant: listOrgs without include_blocked=true never includes the org in its response array

correctness_properties.title: Cascade Delete Completeness
correctness_properties.for_any: organization in orgs that is deleted via deleteOrg
correctness_properties.invariant: no rows in org_members with the deleted org's id remain after the DELETE completes; user rows in users are unaffected

correctness_properties.title: Idempotent Block
correctness_properties.invariant: calling blockOrg N times produces the same org state as calling it once; subsequent calls return HTTP 200 without changing updated_at beyond the first block

correctness_properties.title: Idempotent Unblock
correctness_properties.invariant: calling unblockOrg N times produces the same org state as calling it once; subsequent calls return HTTP 200 without changing updated_at beyond the first unblock

correctness_properties.title: Idempotent Add Member
correctness_properties.invariant: calling addOrgMember with the same (org_id, user_id) pair any number of times results in exactly one row in org_members and always returns HTTP 204

correctness_properties.title: Unique Name and Slug Across Organizations
correctness_properties.invariant: no two rows share the same name value, and no two rows share the same slug value

correctness_properties.title: No Unauthenticated Access
correctness_properties.for_any: HTTP request to any org endpoint without a valid credential
correctness_properties.invariant: the response status is 401 and no org data is included in the response body

correctness_properties.title: Cache-Control No-Store on All Org Responses
correctness_properties.for_any: HTTP response from any org handler

steps.action: Sends POST /orgs with JSON body containing name, slug, and optional url, with a valid admin credential
Validates the credential and injects AuthInfo into the Echo context
Calls RequireAdmin(c); confirms admin access
Binds and validates CreateOrgRequest; checks name non-empty, validates slug format
Generates UUID v4 org ID; calls NowUTC() via Server Core (spec 01) for timestamps
Executes INSERT into orgs table via *sql.DB (spec 02)
Returns HTTP 201 with OrgResponse JSON body
Sends GET /orgs/:id with a valid non-admin credential
Validates the credential and injects AuthInfo; marks user as non-admin
Parses and validates the UUID from :id path parameter
Queries orgs table for the matching row via *sql.DB
Calls IsAdmin(c) — returns false
Calls isOrgMember(db, orgID, GetUserID(c)) — returns true
Calls SetETag(c, org.UpdatedAt) via Server Core (spec 01)
Returns HTTP 200 with OrgResponse JSON body and ETag header

execution_paths.title: Admin Blocks and Unblocks an Organization

steps.action: Sends POST /orgs/:id/block with a valid admin credential
Validates credential and injects AuthInfo
Calls RequireAdmin(c); confirms admin access
Queries orgs table to fetch current org state
Detects org is active; sets status='blocked' and updated_at=NowUTC(), executes UPDATE in orgs table
Returns HTTP 200 with updated OrgResponse where status is 'blocked'
Sends POST /orgs/:id/unblock with a valid admin credential
Calls RequireAdmin(c); confirms admin access; queries org; detects blocked; sets status='active'; executes UPDATE; returns HTTP 200 with status 'active'
Sends PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id with valid admin credential
Validates credential and injects AuthInfo
Calls RequireAdmin(c); confirms admin access
Validates both UUID path parameters
Queries orgs table to verify org exists via *sql.DB (spec 02)
Queries users table to verify user exists via *sql.DB (spec 02)
Inserts row into org_members with created_at=NowUTC(); returns HTTP 204
Sends GET /orgs/:id/members to verify the new member appears in the list
Queries org_members joined with users, orders by username, returns HTTP 200 with array including the new member
Sends DELETE /orgs/:id/members/:user_id to remove the member
Deletes the org_members row; returns HTTP 204

execution_paths.title: Full Organization Lifecycle: Create, Update, Delete with Cascade

steps.action: Sends POST /orgs to create a new org; receives HTTP 201 with OrgResponse
Sends PUT /orgs/:id/members/:user_id to add a member; receives HTTP 204
Sends PATCH /orgs/:id with updated name; receives HTTP 200 with updated OrgResponse
Sends GET /orgs/:id to verify updated name and incremented updated_at; receives HTTP 200
Sends DELETE /orgs/:id to delete the org
Executes DELETE on orgs table; database ON DELETE CASCADE removes all org_members rows for this org; users table rows are unaffected
Returns HTTP 204 with no body
Sends GET /orgs/:id to confirm deletion; receives HTTP 404 with 'organization not found'
Sends GET /orgs; receives HTTP 200 with array of active orgs only
Sends POST /orgs/:id/block to block one org; receives HTTP 200
Sends GET /orgs again; receives HTTP 200 with array that excludes the blocked org
Sends GET /orgs?include_blocked=true; receives HTTP 200 with array including both active and blocked orgs

error_handling.condition: POST /orgs body has missing or empty name field
error_handling.behavior: createOrg returns HTTP 400 via APIError with message 'name is required'

error_handling.condition: POST /orgs body has missing or empty slug field
error_handling.behavior: createOrg returns HTTP 400 via APIError with message 'slug is required'

error_handling.condition: POST /orgs body has a slug that fails slug validation rules
error_handling.behavior: createOrg returns HTTP 400 via APIError with message 'invalid slug format'

error_handling.condition: POST /orgs INSERT violates UNIQUE constraint on orgs.name
error_handling.behavior: createOrg returns HTTP 409 via APIError with message 'organization name already exists'

error_handling.condition: POST /orgs INSERT violates UNIQUE constraint on orgs.slug
error_handling.behavior: createOrg returns HTTP 409 via APIError with message 'organization slug already exists'

error_handling.condition: Any request to an org endpoint is received without a valid credential
error_handling.behavior: Auth middleware rejects the request with HTTP 401 before the handler executes

error_handling.condition: Non-admin user accesses an admin-only org endpoint
error_handling.behavior: RequireAdmin returns an error; handler propagates HTTP 403 via APIError with message 'forbidden'

error_handling.condition: Non-member non-admin user sends GET /orgs/:id or GET /orgs/:id/members
error_handling.behavior: getOrg or listOrgMembers returns HTTP 403 via APIError with message 'forbidden'

error_handling.condition: UUID path parameter :id is not a valid UUID
error_handling.behavior: Handler returns HTTP 400 via APIError with message 'invalid organization id'

error_handling.condition: UUID path parameter :user_id is not a valid UUID
error_handling.behavior: Handler returns HTTP 400 via APIError with message 'invalid user id'

error_handling.condition: Org lookup in orgs table returns db.ErrNotFound
error_handling.behavior: Handler returns HTTP 404 via APIError with message 'organization not found'

error_handling.condition: User lookup in users table returns db.ErrNotFound on addOrgMember
error_handling.behavior: addOrgMember returns HTTP 404 via APIError with message 'user not found'

error_handling.condition: org_members DELETE affects zero rows on removeOrgMember
error_handling.behavior: removeOrgMember returns HTTP 404 via APIError with message 'membership not found'

error_handling.condition: PATCH /orgs/:id body contains no recognized fields (both name and url are nil)
error_handling.behavior: updateOrg returns HTTP 400 via APIError with message 'no fields to update'

error_handling.condition: PATCH /orgs/:id UPDATE violates UNIQUE constraint on orgs.name
error_handling.behavior: updateOrg returns HTTP 409 via APIError with message 'organization name already exists'

error_handling.condition: Any database operation fails with an error that is not a UNIQUE constraint violation or ErrNotFound
error_handling.behavior: Handler wraps the error via db.WrapError and returns HTTP 500 via APIError with message 'internal server error'; raw SQL error details are not exposed in the response

error_handling.condition: isOrgMember query fails with a database error
error_handling.behavior: isOrgMember returns (false, error); the calling handler propagates HTTP 500 via APIError with message 'internal server error'

symbols.name: Context
symbols.notes: Echo request context passed to all handlers; provides Param(), QueryParam(), Bind(), JSON(), etc.

symbols.name: Group
symbols.notes: Echo route group on which all org endpoints are registered via RegisterOrgHandlers.

symbols.name: New
symbols.notes: Generates a random UUID v4. Used for org ID generation on create.

symbols.name: Parse
symbols.notes: Parses a UUID string; returns an error if the string is not a valid UUID. Used to validate :id and :user_id path parameters.

symbols.name: DB
symbols.notes: Standard Go database handle. Passed to RegisterOrgHandlers and used for all orgs and org_members queries.
